{
  "title": "Barton Investment Management Sells 2,927 Shares of Apple Inc. $AAPL",
  "url": "https://www.marketbeat.com/instant-alerts/filing-barton-investment-management-sells-2927-shares-of-apple-inc-aapl-2026-04-24/",
  "summary": "Barton Investment Management reduced its stake in Apple Inc. ($AAPL) by 10.3% in the fourth quarter, selling 2,927 shares and holding 25,402 shares valued at $6.91 million. This sale made Apple 0.7% of its portfolio and its 18th-largest holding. Meanwhile, other institutional investors increased their positions in Apple, and company insiders like SVP Deirdre O'Brien and CEO Tim Cook also sold a portion of their holdings.",
